profile.name: Stefani Tick
profile.role: Creative Strategist · Marketing Strategist · Project Builder
profile.bio: Marketing professional with 9+ years of experience across creative execution, activation, brand support, and strategy-led system development. Work spans integrated campaigns, field execution, cross-functional collaboration, and the design of practical tools that turn market signals into clearer decisions.

expertise.name: Motion Design
expertise.desc: Video, animation, and motion graphics for campaigns, activations, and presentations.

expertise.name: Creative Strategy
expertise.desc: Translating brand objectives into creative concepts with clear narratives.

expertise.name: Marketing Strategy
expertise.desc: Activation planning, market insight framing, and recommendation design.

expertise.name: Community Strategy
expertise.desc: Building engagement systems and community-facing programs.

expertise.name: Systems & Tools
expertise.desc: No-code and Sheets-based operational systems, dashboards, and workflow logic.

experience.desc: Began with creative production and motion/visual support, then expanded into activation execution, cross-district coordination, strategic planning support, and structured market insight projects.
Supported creative development and visual execution work, learning campaign thinking, agency workflow, and collaboration with senior creatives.

works.title: dir()
works.subtitle: Demand Insight & Recommendation Engine
works.shortDesc: Internal program to turn weekly field surveys into market recommendations at sentra level.
works.fullDesc: Strategic internal program designed to transform weekly and biweekly field survey data into actionable market recommendations. Developed the overall concept, storytelling, dashboard direction, and recommendation logic framework around four strategic types: counter competitor, trending price/category, winning SKU maintenance, and long-term premium push.

works.title: reach(z)
works.subtitle: Gen Z Coffee Shop Marketing Concept
works.shortDesc: Proposal for a cigarette-channel marketing solution built around coffee shop smoking areas.
works.fullDesc: Developed a complete concept, positioning, and business narrative for a new channel approach aimed at younger adult consumers. Explored how on-site booth presence, signage, product visibility, and an operational support app could work together as one ecosystem.

works.title: EASTCHAMP 2026
works.subtitle: Tournament Website & Event Assets
works.shortDesc: Static tournament site and event support for an eSports competition with qualifiers, schedules, and brackets.
works.fullDesc: Designed and refined site structure for pages including home, schedule, bracket, teams, rules, gallery, and scoreboard. Connected the site to Google Sheets as a dynamic data source and used GitHub-hosted assets for team logos and media.

works.title: Rally Manager
works.subtitle: Leaderboard & Session System
works.shortDesc: Google Sheets and Apps Script-based operational system for sports session management and rankings.
works.fullDesc: Designed complete logic and workflow for sessions, rallies, player registration, waitlist handling, match generation, and status tracking. Structured weekly and monthly ranking logic so game outcomes, bonuses, wins, match counts, and rally wins could be aggregated into readable standings.

works.title: Executive Dashboard
works.subtitle: Wireframing & Recommendation Design
works.shortDesc: Dashboard design work focused on making complex market data easier to read for decision-makers.

works.title: Multi-City Activation
works.subtitle: Engagement Support & Creative
works.shortDesc: Creative and communication support for campaigns and marketing activities across multiple cities.

works.title: Creative Motion Work
works.subtitle: Visual & Video Assets
works.shortDesc: Long-running body of visual and motion-based marketing materials for campaigns, activations, and presentations.

works.title: Split Bill App
works.subtitle: Billiard + F&B Settlement
works.shortDesc: Sheets-based settlement and outstanding-tracking application for shared table fees and food & beverage payments.
